chants.title: One Nil to the Arsenal
chants.lyrics:
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
chants.tuneName: Go West (Pet Shop Boys / Village People)
chants.contextNotes: [UNVERIFIED: AI-drafted lyrics, pending Andrew's verification] Sung when leading 1-0. One of the most recognisable Arsenal chants.

chants.title: 49 Undefeated
chants.lyrics:
Forty-nine, forty-nine undefeated
Forty-nine, forty-nine I say
Forty-nine, forty-nine undefeated
Playing football the Arsenal way
chants.contextNotes: [UNVERIFIED: AI-drafted lyrics, pending Andrew's verification] Celebrates the Invincibles' 49-match unbeaten run (2003-2004).

chants.title: Saka and Emile Smith Rowe
chants.lyrics:
And I like it,
I like it,
I like it,
I like it,
I la-la-like it,
La-la, like it,
Here we go, oh!
Saka and Emile Smith Rowe!
chants.contextNotes: [AI-drafted context, pending Andrew's verification] Started when Saka and Smith Rowe broke through together. Still sung for Saka.
